# Dan Shea

> Dan Shea is a software engineer at Arista Networks in Sydney, Australia. His
> interests include operating systems, microkernels, networks, and security.
> This is his personal website.

Dan has worked at Arista Networks since 2024 (previously interning there in
2023). He graduated from the University of New South Wales (UNSW) with a
Bachelor of Engineering (Honours) in Software Engineering, earning First Class
Honours, and a Bachelor of Science in Bioinformatics with Distinction, as well
as the John Lions Computer Science Honours Award. His honours thesis, with the
Trustworthy Systems group and supervised by Gernot Heiser, worked on optimising
an IRQ fastpath for the seL4 microkernel. He has taught
operating systems courses at UNSW (COMP3231 Operating Systems and COMP9242
Advanced Operating Systems) as a casual academic, and previously held a KCCG
Genomics Summer Research Scholarship at the Garvan Institute of Medical
Research.

## Publications

- "Quantitative ctDNA Detection in Hepatoblastoma: Implications for Precision
  Medicine", Cancers, 19 December 2023.

## Site contents

- [Home](https://danshea.net/): An interactive WebGL fractal with a portal
  into the Topdown engine, and an emblem animating stable three-body orbits.
- [Topdown](https://danshea.net/topdown/): A from-scratch game engine by Dan,
  compiled to WebAssembly and running in the browser.
- [Resume](https://danshea.net/resume.pdf): Dan's resume (PDF).

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/danshea00)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/danshea00)
